visualization.title: Number of students who received more than one scholarship

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  'Students with >1 scholarships'::text AS label,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM (
      SELECT scholarships.student_id
      FROM public.scholarships AS scholarships
      GROUP BY scholarships.student_id
      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    ) AS t
  ) AS students_with_multiple_scholarships;

issues: The visualization uses a synthetic single-category 'label' column to render one bar; consider a KPI/text display instead of a bar for a single scalar.
The SQL applies no filters (e.g., year, paid status); if you intended to restrict the count, add appropriate WHERE clauses.
X-axis has no title (axis.title is null); the single category label is visible but the axis label could be made explicit for clarity.

visualization.title: Number of students who received more than one scholarship

result.sql:
SELECT
  'Students with >1 scholarships'::text AS label,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM (
      SELECT scholarships.student_id
      FROM public.scholarships AS scholarships
      GROUP BY scholarships.student_id
      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    ) AS t
  ) AS students_with_multiple_scholarships;

issues: The visualization uses a synthetic single-category 'label' column to render one bar; consider a KPI/text display instead of a bar for a single scalar.
The SQL applies no filters (e.g., year, paid status); if you intended to restrict the count, add appropriate WHERE clauses.
X-axis has no title (axis.title is null); the single category label is visible but the axis label could be made explicit for clarity.
